computed_by: footprint_model.py — sum of ECAV + ICECAV + STI energy each year
limitations: Utility phase only. Excludes manufacturing, logistics, and end-of-life. Hardware efficiency projections are scenario assumptions.

computed_by: footprint_model.py — ECAV fleet × per-vehicle energy rate
limitations: Per-vehicle energy rates from published AV hardware benchmarks (2019–2023); real deployment may differ.

computed_by: footprint_model.py — ECAV energy × 1.6 ICE power factor
limitations: The 1.6× ICE power factor is a model assumption; no empirical fleet measurement available.

computed_by: footprint_model.py — STI unit count × per-unit energy rate
limitations: STI deployment growth rates are scenario parameters; per-unit energy rates from limited published data.

computed_by: footprint_model.py — ECAV fleet × sensing rate per autonomy level
limitations: Sensing rates vary by L3/L4/L5 classification; real vehicles may span multiple levels simultaneously.

computed_by: footprint_model.py — ECAV fleet × computing rate per autonomy level
limitations: Computing is dominant subsystem; rates from NVIDIA DRIVE / Mobileye benchmarks.

computed_by: footprint_model.py — ECAV fleet × communication rate per autonomy level
limitations: Communication rates well-characterised (V2X standards); lowest uncertainty subsystem.

computed_by: footprint_model.py — STI units × sensing rate by deployment tier
limitations: Three deployment tiers (Basic/Semi/Highly); real deployments may not map cleanly.

computed_by: footprint_model.py — STI units × computing rate by deployment tier
limitations: Computing dominates STI energy; highly dependent on deployed inference hardware.

computed_by: footprint_model.py — STI units × communication rate by deployment tier
limitations: Communication rates well-characterised for infrastructure standards.

computed_by: footprint_model.py — electricity × (clean_fraction × e_clean + fossil_fraction × e_fossil) + gasoline × e_gasoline
limitations: Does not include upstream supply-chain emissions (Scope 3). Grid emission factors are L1 uncertain.

computed_by: footprint_model.py — ECAV electricity × grid emission factors
limitations: Driven entirely by grid decarbonization scenario assumption.

computed_by: footprint_model.py — ICECAV electricity × grid factors + gasoline × e_gasoline
limitations: Gasoline emission factor assumed constant at 1.65 kg CO2/kWh equivalent. 12-year retirement cycle.

computed_by: footprint_model.py — STI electricity × grid emission factors
limitations: Contingent on STI deployment rate scenario assumption.

computed_by: footprint_model.py — cumulative adoption model applied to initial fleet data
limitations: Growth rates are scenario parameters. Initial fleet from DMV/census data (2024).

computed_by: Dashboard computation: ATS Emissions ÷ Total CAV
limitations: STI emissions included in numerator. Early-year instability from near-zero CAV denominator.

computed_by: argmax over annual ATS Emissions time series
limitations: Depends on scenario growth rates; meaningful only within scenario assumptions.

computed_by: First year after peak where emissions have declined to 50% of peak value
limitations: Highly sensitive to EV adoption and grid decarbonization rates. Can shift 5–15 years with small parameter changes.

computed_by: Numerical integration (trapezoidal sum) of annual ATS Emissions
limitations: Uncertainty accumulates over time; p95/p05 spread widens for cumulative totals.

computed_by: footprint_model.py — logistic growth from initial EV share
limitations: EV adoption rate is a core scenario parameter. Baseline uses ~7% annual growth. No market equilibrium modeled.

computed_by: footprint_model.py — linear growth from initial f_clean
limitations: Grid decarbonization rate is a scenario parameter. California initial f_clean = 0.63. Not a forecast.

computed_by: NOT IMPLEMENTED
limitations: No lifecycle inventory data. Would need per-model bill-of-materials and manufacturing energy intensity. Not in v2 scope.

computed_by: NOT IMPLEMENTED
limitations: Would require supplier-level Scope 3 data. Not in v2 scope.

computed_by: NOT IMPLEMENTED
limitations: Would require recycling/disposal intensity data. Not in v2 scope.
